title: Rena's Sand
description: Tweaks Sand & Sandstone's textures, along with giving Red Sand a change in pallette!
body:
![Rena's Sand Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f6d17ece5340500ff846c296996ace8430494b3.png)
# What is this pack?
This pack changes Red Sand's colours and gives double slab variants to sandstone slabs and gives their respective wall types a new look!

## Pack Features

- Double Slab variants for Sandstone and Cut Sandstone Slabs (Red and Normal)
- New textures for Sandstone Stairs
- Support for [Philip's Ruins](https://modrinth.com/mod/philips-ruins) (Changes Sandstone Bricks and Tiles)
- New colour palette for Red Sand
- New models for Sandstone walls (Adds top and bottom texture, along with varied side texture depending on height)
